hypothesis: If a cross-modal predictive architecture is trained to predict each modality's latent representation from the other two modalities (graph, text, and XRD) using lightweight MLPs, then the Band Gap prediction MAE on the AFLOW dataset will be lower than that of single-modal baselines (CGCNN, CoGN, ALIGNN) because integrating graph, textual descriptions, and diffraction patterns provides complementary information that improves latent representations.
